recommendations.title: Seed
recommendations.overview: After surviving the electric chair, convicted serial killer Max Seed is buried alive. He digs himself out of the grave and goes on a killing spree. Taking revenge on the men who put him there and random unfortunates alike.

recommendations.title: Behind the Mask: The Rise of Leslie Vernon
recommendations.overview: The next great psycho horror slasher has given a documentary crew exclusive access to his life as he plans his reign of terror over the sleepy town of Glen Echo, all the while deconstructing the conventions and archetypes of the horror genre for them

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Hellworld
recommendations.overview: When five hardcore Internet gamers are invited to a special party thrown by the website Hellworld, they endure a night of unspeakable terror.

recommendations.title: The Poughkeepsie Tapes
recommendations.overview: When hundreds of videotapes showing torture, murder and dismemberment are found in an abandoned house, they reveal a serial killer's decade-long reign of terror and become the most disturbing collection of evidence homicide detectives have ever seen.

recommendations.title: Alone in the Dark 2
recommendations.overview: When the night falls, and the creatures of the dark are crawling out of the shadows, there is only one man who stands between us and evil: Edward Carnby.

recommendations.title: Trauma
recommendations.overview: A young Romanian woman and a recovering drug addict launch an unlikely investigation after her parents are murdered by a vicious serial killer known as The Headhunter.

recommendations.title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers
recommendations.overview: Six years after being presumed dead in a fire, and just as the town prepares to finally celebrate Halloween again, Michael Myers returns to Haddonfield to continue his reign of terror.

recommendations.title: The Crow
recommendations.overview: Exactly one year after young rock guitarist Eric Draven and his fiancée are brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals, Draven, watched over by a hypnotic crow, returns from the grave to exact revenge.

recommendations.title: Carne
recommendations.overview: A woman who works in a meat packing plant is continuously preyed upon by lecherous men.

recommendations.title: Pumpkinhead II: Blood Wings
recommendations.overview: Thrill-seeking teenagers resurrect a demon from his grave and a bloody rampage for revenge begins.
